Option 2 Lisa's the baby, Bart's the toddler and Maggie is their big sister.

choices: Bart's diaper and Lisa's pull up are dry
Bart's diaper is wet Lisa's pull up is dry

1112.content: Mom tells Maggie to take Bart and Lisa upstairs to the nursery for naptime and to check Bart's diaper and Lisa's pull up before you put them in the crib. What happens next?
1112.title: Naptime

choices: Just quietly read her a story
Have her try to go potty
Ask if she has to go potty
11121.content: After checking Bart's diaper and Lisa's pull up. Maggie noticed that Bart kept his diaper dry and Lisa kept her pull up dry. What does Maggie do with Lisa after putting baby Bart in the crib?
11121.title: Bart's diaper and Lisa's pull up are dry

choices: Lisa needs to go potty
Bart wakes up needing a diaper
Bart wakes up needing something but it's not a diaper
111211.content: So Maggie finds a bedtime story to read with Lisa. So Maggie begins reading the story to Lisa. When all of a sudden Lisa starts reading ahead. So Maggie starts taking turns reading the story with Lisa. When all of a sudden what happens and interrupts her storytime with Lisa?
111211.title: Just quietly read her a story

choices: Doing the pee pee  which tells Maggie that Lisa has to pee on the potty
Farting a lot which tells Maggie that Lisa has to poop on the potty
Does the pee pee dance while farting which tells Maggie that Lisa has to go both
111212.content: Maggie say to Lisa, I want you to at least try to go potty. Lisa says I don't have go yet Maggie. When all of a sudden what signs does Lisa give Maggie that she now has to go what on the potty?
111212.title: Have her try to go potty

choices: She only pee on the potty and was just passing gas
She goes both on the potty
She runs too fast to her potty and falls relieving her bladder and bowels
111213.content: At first after Maggie asks Lisa if she has to go potty. Lisa says no I don't have to now, but I'll use the potty when I have to Maggie. Maggie politely asks Lisa again a few minutes later. Lisa says this time maybe I do Maggie, but I'm just going to wait a little before trying my potty. Maggie politely asks Lisa again a few minutes later. This time Lisa doesn't say a word as she's trying to hold her bladder and bowels, but her body language alerts Maggie. So Maggie tells Lisa that her body language is telling that you need to go now or you'll have a potty accident in your dry pull up. What happens next with Lisa needing to go potty
111213.title: Ask if she has to go potty

choices: When she rechecks Lisa and Bart after naptime
Before naptime
During naptime to avoid being peed on
11122.content: After checking Bart's diaper and Lisa's pull up. Maggie noticed that Bart wet his diaper and Lisa kept her pull up dry. When does Maggie actually change Bart's wet diaper?
11122.title: Bart's diaper is wet Lisa's pull up is dry

choices: Has Lisa try to go some more on the potty
Ask Lisa if she still needs to go potty
Put a new pull up on Lisa and take her to potty after naptime
11123.content: After checking Bart's diaper and Lisa's pull up. Maggie noticed that Bart kept his diaper dry and Lisa wet her pull up dry. What does Maggie have Lisa do after she takes off her wet pull up?
11123.title: Bart's diaper is dry Lisa's pull up is wet

info.brief_description: Maggie finds away to make herself the oldest sibling.
info.description: Maggie has had it with the way Bart and Lisa are fighting each other and plans to regress their age down to a one year old baby and a two year old toddler. Which sibling would you want to be the toddler and which to be the baby?
info.pretty_title: Maggie sick and tired of being the baby
